title: One in Three Americans Delay Medical Care Due to Cost, HealthEquity Research Finds
author: Healthequity
description: Over one-third of American workers are delaying or avoiding medical care due to cost, impacting workplace productivity with an estimated $183 billion annual loss to employers. However, HSA holders demonstrate significantly stronger financial readiness and confidence in managing healthcare expenses, with 88% reporting their HSA helps them feel financially prepared.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: HealthEquity is positioned favorably as the research demonstrates strong differentiation for HSA holders, showing 88% report improved financial security and 43% higher likelihood of finding healthcare affordable compared to non-HSA holders. The data supports HSA adoption as a solution to workforce financial resilience, directly benefiting HealthEquity's core business as the largest independent HSA custodian.

title: HealthEquity Delivers Record Q4 and Standout Fiscal 2026 Sales Metrics
author: Healthequity, Inc.
description: HealthEquity reported strong fiscal 2026 results with HSAs growing 7% to 10.6 million accounts and total accounts reaching 17.8 million. HSA assets increased 14% to $36.5 billion, with HSA investments surging 26% to $18.5 billion. The company achieved record fourth-quarter new HSA sales, growing 17% year-over-year, adding over one million new HSA accounts from sales during the fiscal year. HealthEquity reaffirmed guidance for fiscal 2026 and 2027.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: HealthEquity demonstrated strong operational performance with 7% HSA growth, 14% increase in total HSA assets, 26% growth in HSA investments, and record fourth-quarter new HSA sales up 17% year-over-year. The company added over one million new HSA accounts from sales and maintained high client retention, indicating robust business momentum and market demand despite softer job growth.

title: HealthEquity Net Income Jumps 67% in Q2
author: Motley Fool Markets Team
description: HealthEquity reported strong Q2 fiscal 2026 financial results with 9% revenue growth and 67% net income increase, while experiencing slower organic HSA account sales and raising full-year guidance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Demonstrated robust financial performance with significant revenue and net income growth, raised full-year guidance, improved operational efficiency, and maintained strong asset growth despite some slowdown in new account acquisitions

title: HealthEquity's AI-Powered Tool Recognized for Innovation in Streamlining Benefits Education
author: Atiya Easterling
description: HealthEquity introduced HSAnswers, an AI-powered educational tool that provides personalized responses to complex healthcare benefits questions, winning multiple industry awards for its innovative approach to simplifying benefits information.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company launched an innovative AI tool that won multiple industry awards, demonstrated significant user engagement, and aims to solve real problems for millions of Americans in understanding healthcare benefits

title: HealthEquity Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date Presentations at Investor Conferences
author: N/A
description: HealthEquity, the largest HSA custodian, announced plans to release its Q1 FY2026 financial results and host a conference call on June 3, 2025. The company also announced upcoming investor conference presentations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article announces upcoming financial results and investor conference participation, indicating the company's continued growth and engagement with the investment community.
